[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00010100 2
1 10000000 1
2 00010000 1
3 01101000 3
4 00000000 a
5 01000010 2
6 00011100 3
7 11001011 5

01 10 11101110 6
12 21 01000010 2 match 5
23 32 11011110 6
34 43 11010111 6
45 54 01011101 5
56 65 00010010 2
67 76 00011101 4
70 07 11110111 7

02 20 10101100 4
13 31 10011100 4
24 42 00001001 2
35 53 10001010 3
46 64 01001111 5
57 75 00001111 4
60 06 11101010 5
71 17 00011001 3

03 30 01110010 4
14 41 01001011 4
25 52 01010100 3
36 63 10011000 3
47 74 01010010 3
50 05 11111000 5
61 16 00000100 1
72 27 01011011 5

04 40 10100101 4
15 51 00010110 3
26 62 01000110 3
37 73 10000101 3
